inputs.label: Total Daily Calories
inputs.businessContext: Total daily caloric intake target for an individual or total batch energy content for a ketogenic product.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total daily caloric intake target for an individual or total batch energy content for a ketogenic product.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birey için günlük kalori alım hedefi veya ketojenik ürün için toplam parti enerji içeriği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tägliches Kalorienziel für eine Person oder Gesamtenergiegehalt einer Charge für ein ketogenes Produkt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Apport calorique quotidien total cible pour un individu ou contenu énergétique total d'un lot pour un produit cétogène.
businessContext_i18n.es: Objetivo de ingesta calórica diaria total para un individuo o contenido energético total del lote para un producto cetogénico.

inputs.label: Fat Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total calories from fat. Standard ketogenic ratio is 70-75%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total calories from fat. Standard ketogenic ratio is 70-75%.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Gesamtkalorien aus Fett. Standard ketogenes Verhältnis beträgt 70-75%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de calories provenant des lipides. Le ratio cétogène standard est de 70-75%.

inputs.label: Protein Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total calories from protein. Standard ketogenic ratio is 20-25%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total calories from protein. Standard ketogenic ratio is 20-25%.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Gesamtkalorien aus Protein. Standard ketogenes Verhältnis beträgt 20-25%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de calories provenant des protéines. Le ratio cétogène standard est de 20-25%.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de calorías totales provenientes de proteínas. La proporción cetogénica estándar es 20-25%.

inputs.label: Carbohydrate Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of total calories from carbohydrates. Standard ketogenic ratio is 5-10%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of total calories from carbohydrates. Standard ketogenic ratio is 5-10%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam kalorinin karbonhidratlardan gelen yüzdesi. Standart ketojenik oran %5-10'dur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Gesamtkalorien aus Kohlenhydraten. Standard ketogenes Verhältnis beträgt 5-10%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de calories provenant des glucides. Le ratio cétogène standard est de 5-10%.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de calorías totales provenientes de carbohidratos. La proporción cetogénica estándar es 5-10%.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
